title: California Straight Ahead
writer: Dwinelle Benthall, Byron Morgan, Harry A. Pollard
actors: Reginald Denny, Gertrude Olmstead, Tom Wilson
plot: Wealthy racing driver Tom Hayden (Reginald Denny) loses his inheritance and his fiance due to a wacky mishap on his wedding day. Now his parents and the parents of his bride to be no longer trust him. To get his reputation and his...
